heading: Data Models
body:
- To learn more about Data Modeling in MongoDB and the flexible schema
  model, see [Data Modeling Introduction](manual/core/data-modeling-introduction).

- To learn more about the tradeoffs between embedded and normalized
  data models, see [Data Modeling](manual/data-modeling).

- MongoDB also offers a free MongoDB University Course on Data Modeling:
  [Data Modeling for MongoDB](https://learn.mongodb.com/learning-paths/data-modeling-for-mongodb).
